markdown:
#  View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To view purchase orders or subcontracts NOT marked Private_ , 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Commitments tool.
    * _To view purchase orders or subcontracts marked Private_ :
      * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.   
OR
      * 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool and you must be a member of the 'Private' list on the commitment.   
OR 
      * 'Read Only' or 'Standard' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool with the ['View Private Work Order Contract' granular permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) and/or ['View Private Purchase Order Contract' granular ](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template)[permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) enabled on the permission template. This permission allows you to view the Change Orders tab on the subcontract.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This item can be viewed or edited offline if it was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Purchase Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order) or [Create a Subcontract](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-subcontract)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Use the **Purchase Orders** or **Subcontracts** tabs to locate your commitment.
  3. Tap the commitment that you want to view.
  4. View information for the commitment on the Details and Change Orders tabs.  
_Note:_ If you want to view the Schedule of Values for the commitment, scroll down on the **Details** tab and tap **Schedule of Values**.


## See Also
  * [View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (Android) - SK TEST](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/view-purchase-orders-and-subcontracts-android-sk-test)
  * [View Change Orders (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/view-change-orders-android)
  * [View Inclusions and Exclusions for Subcontracts (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-android/tutorials/view-inclusions-and-exclusions-for-subcontracts-android)
title: View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (Android)
description: How to view purchase orders and subcontracts using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
